text: The function of a hydrostatic release unit (HRU) is:

options.text: To automatically unhook the lashing and release the life raft when the ship sinks
To measure the depth of the sea
To pump water out of the life raft

explanation: A Hydrostatic Release Unit (HRU) is a pressure-sensitive device that automatically releases the life raft's lashing when submerged to a depth of 1.5 to 4 meters, allowing the raft to float free as the ship sinks.
